Description: Lucky Gold Letter (850337) and Scarlet Red Letter (850338) as stackable trophies. Clones from original letter WCIDs (45875, 45876) for MirrorEmoteFromWcid. Blue IconUnderlay (100676435), no number overlay. Value=1, EncumbranceVal=1.

Weenies.Notes: Lucky Gold Letter (stackable trophy). Blue underlay. T2 (Quality) reward.

PropertiesString.Name: Lucky Gold Letter
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these letters to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.

Weenies.Notes: Scarlet Red Letter (stackable trophy). Blue underlay. T1 (Regular) reward.

PropertiesString.Name: Scarlet Red Letter
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these letters to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.
